title: The Battle of Neretva
writer: Stevan Bulajic, Ratko Djurovic, Veljko Bulajic
actors: Yul Brynner, Hardy Krüger, Franco Nero
plot: World War II drama about the 1943 battle around the Neretva River between Axis forces and Yugoslav partisan units.
country: Yugoslavia, Italy, West Germany, United States, France
awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 1 win & 1 nomination total
